title: GPT 5.6, Mythos ban lifted, realtime avatars, Seedance 2.5, brain ultrasound: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a video news roundup covering major AI releases including GPT 5.6, Seedance 2.5, Seed 2.1, Krea 2, and hardware announcements from OpenAI, IBM, and others. The video also reports on the lifting of a ban on Mythos and discusses emerging applications in brain ultrasound imaging and real-time avatars.
writeup: AI Search compiles a news roundup spanning roughly 25 recent AI products and technical developments. Coverage includes GPT 5.6, Seedance 2.5, multiple video and image generation tools, realtime avatars, chip advances, text-to-speech, humanoid robots, and brain ultrasound medical imaging. The format aggregates announcements across video generation, chip design, hardware, and model evaluation into a single briefing.
